description: Nearly constant value with minimal variation
industrial_examples: Stable oven temperature or oxygen in well-ventilated area

description: Small random variations around a baseline
industrial_examples: CO, H2S detectors showing minor fluctuations

description: Value increases linearly from start to target
Value decreases linearly from start to target
industrial_examples: O2 deficiency, pressure drop after relief
Gas dilution after ventilation or thermal cooling

description: Sudden rise followed by quick decay
industrial_examples: Smoke burst, ember hotspot, pressure surge

description: Return from abnormal to normal range
Instant change from one state to another
industrial_examples: Hood seal open/close, permit state change

description: Slow response to heating or cooling
Gas concentration rises with spatial diffusion
Gradual long-term drift in process variable
industrial_examples: Water quality or level drift over shift

description: Position moving back and forth between limits
